Our Service is designed so that parents or legal guardians create and manage all accounts. We do not knowingly collect personal information directly from children under 13 without verifiable parental consent."}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 text-gray-600 space-y-1 mt-3","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"Child accounts are created and controlled by the parent/guardian"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"We collect only the minimum information necessary (first name or nickname)"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Parents can review, modify, or delete their child's data at any time"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"We do not serve advertising to children"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"We do not share children's data with third parties for marketing purposes"}]]}]]}]
d:["$","section",null,{"children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#1C1F26] mb-3","children":"4. How We Use Your Information"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 text-gray-600 space-y-1","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"To provide and maintain the Service"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"To manage task assignments, approvals, and reward redemptions"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"To enforce screen time rules via Apple's FamilyControls framework"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"To send transactional emails (account verification, password resets, family invitations)"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"To improve and optimize the Service"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"To respond to support requests"}]]}]]}]
e:["$","section",null,{"children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#1C1F26] mb-3","children":"5. Data is encrypted at rest and in transit."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Apple Sign In"}]," — Optional authentication method. We receive only the information you authorize Apple to share."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Resend"}]," — Transactional email delivery (invitations, password resets). We share only the recipient's email address."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Apple FamilyControls"}]," — Screen time enforcement. App usage tokens are opaque and processed on-device only."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vercel"}]," — Website hosting."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Railway"}]," — API server hosting."]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-600 leading-relaxed mt-3","children":"We do not sell your personal information to any third party."}]]}]

Data Security"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-600 leading-relaxed","children":"We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including TLS 1.2+ encryption in transit, AES-256 encryption at rest, and secure authentication with JWT tokens. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security."}]]}]
10:["$","section",null,{"children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#1C1F26] mb-3","children":"7.
